---
title: "Week 14 - Brain Exam & Project Time"
format: html
editor: visual
---

:::::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Announcements and Agenda

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
- **Brain Exam.** Today! First, some practice.
- **Project Milestone 4.** Project Draft. Whew.
- **THE END IS NEAR.** All work completed by Friday, May 22nd to be guaranteed a grade :)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Today, on Psych 214...**

- **8:55 - 10:00.** Check-In and Brain Exam 2 and Multiple Regression Review Whew.
- **10:00 - 10:10.** Break Time.
- **10:10 - 11:00.** Multiple Regression & Your Final Project.
:::
:::::
::::::

### Class Slides and Materials!!

```{=html}
<iframe data-external="1" class="slide-deck" src="/dvcstats/slides/ch10m4.html" width="100%" height="500px" title=""></iframe>
```

- [Check-In Here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdosJZ27aIXCg6EiC_q_dd2hCGzR4j_auFi4ajlEGhZ-wIlig/viewform?usp=header)
- **Professor R Scripts \[[Zoom Room](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/ofchakmk3d1ep17u2r5r5/APTz8gRoQo9AHhw2XPY5TZs?rlkey=mdept9ym448grm4vya184bbrd&dl=0) + [Room Crew](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/fa4okobq89jhhj0wthgy5/AHJsWr-fakA7N8JnlLZHKIs?rlkey=hfw992f7lj8nzfbcz6qp7n2og&dl=0)\]**

# For Next Week.

#### [Milestone 4](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ScvG86PiyyqHO7Ob5bki04XGzCwLodQ4h57n9Jq5DYI/edit?tab=t.0#bookmark=id.69zpzn1pc12p)

#### [Chapter 11 (Interaction Effects) is OPTIONAL](https://catterson.github.io/ystats/chapters/11R_InteractionFX.html)
